heading: Tax exemption
label: 220307 Tax exemption
text: Notwithstanding of the United States Code or any provision of the District of Columbia Code, the corporation is not required to pay, collect, or account for any tax specified in those provisions in connection with activities conducted within, or on the grounds of, the United States Capitol Building.section 105 of title 4
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)22030736:1219., , as added , , .Oct. 20, 1978Jan. 12, 1983Pub. L. 95–493, § 19Pub. L. 97–44796 Stat. 2364The words “or title 47, chapter 26 of the District of Columbia Code (1973)” (subsequently covered in chapter 20 of title 47 of the District of Columbia Code (1981)) are omitted as unnecessary. The words “in connection with activities conducted” are substituted for “applicable to taxable events occurring” for clarity. The words “occurring . . . on or after ” are omitted as obsolete.January 1, 1964
